calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Denied

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-15-2005 Reset To Jan-26-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Yessenia De Contreras present in pro per and with Spanish Interpreter: Flor Valencia.
Interpreter and Petitioner were sworn and examined.
Matter continued to January 26, 2006 for lack of service to the father. Order continuing matter filed in open court. Petitioner is requested to submit a declaration regarding due diligence in trying to locate the father.
